declaration: All design artifacts in artifacts/design/j3/ comply with Canon LAW 3, 5, 8, 11, 20-22 and RULE 1-5. Zero production code written. Zero modifications to core/ or tests/.

laws.title: Measurability & Observability
laws.law_ref: LAW-3 — Every operation is measured and observable
laws.evidence_detail: All 4 protocols return measured metrics with timestamps. ILoadOrchestrator.measure_p99_latency() returns p50/p99/p999 ms, throughput_ops_sec, error_rate_pct. ILoadOrchestrator.detect_oscillation() returns oscillation_score and peak_count. IStabilityValidator.evaluate_throughput_stability() returns coefficient_of_variation. ICertificationGate.compute_final_score() returns score_breakdown. All measurements carry readiness_trace_id for observability. F4 integration (§7) defines 17 metrics and 6 alerts across all J3 components.
covered_items: ReadinessReport dataclass — all validation results captured
17 F4 metrics defined in integration blueprint §7

laws.title: Stability & Correctness
laws.law_ref: LAW-5 — Stability guarantees through formal validation
laws.evidence_detail: IStabilityValidator evaluates throughput stability via coefficient_of_variation. ICertificationGate.compute_final_score() uses 4 weighted categories (chaos_recovery 25%, load_stability 25%, integrity 25%, canon_compliance 25%) with grade thresholds A(>=0.95)/B(>=0.85)/C(>=0.70)/F(<0.70). CertificationGrade enum (A/B/C/F). ValidationStatus enum (PASS/FAIL/FLAG/SKIPPED). G-C3 blocks certification if data_integrity_verified == False or p99 >= threshold. Certification State Machine (§6) defines 9 transitions from IDLE to FROZEN/BLOCKED.
covered_items: G-C3 Recovery Guard — blocks cert if integrity fails or p99 exceeds
Certification Gate State Machine — 9 transitions, 5 states

laws.title: Recoverability
laws.law_ref: LAW-8 — Every failure MUST have a recovery path
laws.evidence_detail: Every protocol method in IChaosInjector returns expected_recovery_sec. ChaosScenario dataclass has mandatory expected_recovery_sec field (LAW 8 — NON-NEGOTIABLE). G-C1 validates expected_recovery_sec > 0 before any injection. G-C2 monitors recovery_time_remaining vs expected_recovery_sec * 0.5. G-C3 validates recovery_slo_met after restoration. Chaos Recovery State Machine (§1) defines 11 transitions from BASELINE_CAPTURED through FAULT_INJECTED → MONITOR_DEGRADATION → AUTO_RECOVERY → VERIFY_INTEGRITY → COMPLETED/ROLLED_BACK. ChaosExecutionLog captures recovery_duration_ns and recovery_slo_met. Rollback paths for every failure point (§8).
covered_items: IChaosInjector — all 4 inject methods return expected_recovery_sec
G-C1 Pre-Fault Health Guard — validates expected_recovery_sec > 0
G-C2 Degradation Budget Guard — monitors recovery_time_remaining
G-C3 Recovery Verification Guard — validates recovery_slo_met
Chaos Recovery State Machine — 11 transitions, recovery path for every state
Rollback on failure table — 5 failure points with rollback actions

laws.title: No Global Mutable State
laws.evidence_detail: Every J3 protocol document states LAW 11 compliance in its docstring. ChaosScenario is an independent instance (scenario-scoped). LoadProfile is an independent instance. StabilityMetric is an independent measurement instance. ReadinessReport encapsulates all state per report. No global chaos registry, no global load profile store, no global certification lock defined. Protocol docstrings all state 'state is instance-scoped'. Chaos Recovery State Machine transitions are scenario-scoped — no shared state across scenarios.
covered_items: 4 protocol docstrings — all explicitly state LAW 11 compliance
0 global registries or shared state in design
Chaos SM transitions are scenario-scoped (no cross-scenario leakage)

laws.title: Failure Isolation & Targeted Fault Injection
laws.law_ref: LAW-20 — Failures are contained and do not cascade
laws.evidence_detail: IChaosInjector targets specific services (target_service parameter in every inject method). FaultType enum defines 7 distinct fault types (NETWORK_PARTITION, WORKER_FAILURE, DB_FAILOVER, RESOURCE_EXHAUSTION, LATENCY_INJECTION, CONNECTION_DROP, STORAGE_OUTAGE). G-C2 monitors for cascade_failure_detected and forces ESCALATED state if found. ChaosScenario.target_service defines exact fault boundary. J2 Integration (§6) enforces tenant-scoped chaos — cross-tenant injection blocked by J2 G-L1. Zero-data-loss table (§8) guarantees data preservation under every fault type.
covered_items: IChaosInjector — all methods accept target_service parameter
G-C2 — cascade_failure_detected blocks auto-recovery, forces escalation
J2 integration — tenant-scoped chaos only (J2 G-L1 enforced)
Zero-data-loss under chaos table — 5 scenarios with guarantees

laws.title: Severity Propagation & Degradation Containment
laws.law_ref: LAW-21 — Degradation severity is measured and contained
laws.evidence_detail: SeverityLevel enum defines 4 levels (CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW). ChaosScenario carries severity field. G-C2 Degradation Budget Guard checks severity_propagation_contained before allowing auto-recovery. If degradation exceeds threshold → ESCALATED state. IStabilityValidator severity_evaluation in ReadinessReport captures worst severity. ICertificationGate.compute_final_score() includes severity in scoring. ChaosExecutionLog tracks state_transitions for severity audit.

laws.title: Cascading Failure Prevention
laws.law_ref: LAW-22 — Failures are contained; cascading is prevented
laws.evidence_detail: G-C2 Degradation Budget Guard checks cascade_failure_detected and forces ESCALATED if true. ReadinessReport.cascade_risk_detected flag captures cascading failure risk. ICertificationGate.compute_final_score() includes cascade risk in scoring — certification fails if cascade risk detected. Chaos Recovery SM C-T4 transitions to ESCALATED on cascade. J2 Integration (§6) enforces tenant boundaries — cross-scenario chaos is blocked. ChaosScenario instances are independent (LAW 11) preventing state leakage between scenarios.
covered_items: Chaos SM C-T4 — cascade → ESCALATED transition
LAW 11 — scenario instances prevent cross-scenario cascade

rules.title: Determinism
rules.evidence_detail: ChaosScenario.__post_init__ generates scenario_hash deterministically from (scenario_id, target_service, fault_type, duration_sec, expected_recovery_sec, severity). LoadProfile.__post_init__ generates profile_hash deterministically from (profile_id, concurrent_users, dags_per_second, resource_multiplier, duration_sec, ramp_up_curve). ReadinessReport.__post_init__ generates report_hash deterministically. G-D1 Deterministic Load Guard ensures same LoadProfile + ClusterState -> identical load curve (SHA-256 seed for DAG topology). Integration blueprint §8 specifies determinism thresholds for all operations.
covered_items: G-D1 Deterministic Load Guard — same profile + cluster = same curve
§8 Determinism thresholds table — 6 checks with 100% targets

rules.title: Input Validation
rules.evidence_detail: P-R5 requires readiness_trace_id to be non-empty (min 8 chars). LoadProfile validates concurrent_users >= 1, dags_per_second > 0, duration_sec > 0. ChaosScenario validates expected_recovery_sec > 0 (G-C1). All protocol methods specify typed parameters (str, float, int, Enum types). ICertificationGate.load_canon_baseline validates baseline data before scoring (RULE 2 in docstring). Integration blueprint §8 specifies idempotency keys for all 9 operations ensuring safe retry.
covered_items: Typed protocol parameters — all 16 methods across 4 protocols
Idempotency key table — 9 operations with dedup behavior

rules.title: Safety Guards
rules.evidence_detail: 3 Recovery Guards (G-C1–G-C3) defined with explicit conditions and violation responses. G-C1: Pre-Fault Health Guard — blocks injection if health_score < 0.8, error_rate > 5%, or expected_recovery_sec <= 0. G-C2: Degradation Budget Guard — forces ESCALATED if degradation exceeds threshold or cascade detected. G-C3: Recovery Verification Guard — blocks certification if data_sync_lag >= 500ms, lease_transferred == False, audit_hash_match == False, p99 >= threshold, or oscillation detected. G-D1: Deterministic Load Guard — ensures load curve reproducibility. Each guard has Canon ref and violation event.
covered_items: G-C1 — Pre-Fault Health Guard (health_score, error_rate, expected_recovery_sec)
G-C2 — Degradation Budget Guard (degradation threshold, cascade detection, severity)
G-C3 — Recovery Verification Guard (data_sync_lag, lease, audit_hash, p99, oscillation)
G-D1 — Deterministic Load Guard (profile_hash + cluster_state_hash seed)
Stop conditions reference table — 6 conditions mapping to guards

rules.title: Trace Propagation
rules.evidence_detail: Correlation ID hierarchy (§2) defines 6 propagation rules (P-R1–P-R6). readiness_trace_id flows from J3 Initiator through IChaosInjector → ILoadOrchestrator → IStabilityValidator → ICertificationGate → I1/I2/F4. Each layer extends the trace chain with segment suffix (chaos, load, stability, cert). All 16 protocol methods accept and return readiness_trace_id. 10 event hooks (H1–H10) all carry trace_id in payload. J2 Integration (§6) chains readiness_trace_id to enterprise_trace_id for multi-tenant scenarios.
covered_items: 6 propagation rules (P-R1–P-R6) defined in integration blueprint
Trace chain: Initiator → Chaos → Load → Stability → Cert → I1/I2/F4
10 event hooks with trace_id in payload
J2 integration — readiness_trace_id chains to enterprise_trace_id

rules.title: Rollback & Recovery
rules.evidence_detail: Chaos Recovery State Machine defines explicit rollback transition C-T6 (AUTO_RECOVERY → ROLLED_BACK when G-C3 fails) and C-T9 (VERIFY_INTEGRITY → ROLLED_BACK when data integrity check fails). IChaosInjector.restore_baseline() returns pre-fault and post-fault state for rollback verification. IStabilityValidator.verify_rollback_safety() validates pre/post checksums match and recovery SLO was met. Integration blueprint §8 defines 5 rollback actions: remove partial fault state, trigger manual escalation, restore from pre-fault snapshot, discard partial report, revert to previous snapshot. G-C3 requires rollback_safe == True from verify_rollback_safety().
covered_items: Chaos SM C-T6 — AUTO_RECOVERY → ROLLED_BACK on G-C3 failure
Chaos SM C-T9 — VERIFY_INTEGRITY → ROLLED_BACK on integrity failure
G-C3 — rollback_safe == True required for certification
§8 Rollback on failure table — 5 failure points with actions

stop_conditions.condition: All 4 readiness protocols designed with typing.Protocol
Recovery Guards (G-C1-G-C3) prevent certification without data_integrity_verified AND p99 < threshold (RULE 3 + LAW 20-22)
Integration blueprint maps to I1 K8s/Infra, I2 PostgreSQL, J2 Enterprise, F4 Observability
Canon Compliance Matrix maps 100% to LAW 3, 5, 8, 11, 20-22 & RULE 1-5
Zero modifications to core/ or tests/
All delivery files present in artifacts/design/j3/
